summary: Validated new Jobs/Internships feature + SkillBot chatbot. Backend Jobs APIs (public list/filter/search/detail, apply, admin CRUD, stats.total_jobs, auth-gated) all PASS. Public /jobs page, filters, search, apply modal + lead creation, chatbot rule-based replies (mock pricing 499/999), and Floating WhatsApp on bottom-left + chatbot on bottom-right (no overlap) all PASS. CRITICAL FRONTEND BUG: Admin Dashboard Jobs tab renders an empty panel — the `tab === 'jobs'` JSX block (with `new-job-btn`, jobs list, edit/delete) is missing from /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.jsx. JobModal component exists at line 300 but is never invoked because there is no UI to set `showJob`. Related: Leads tab shows job_apply leads as rows but Type badge is blank (LEAD_TYPE_LABELS['job_apply'] not defined) and no 'job_apply' filter chip in leads filter row.
passed: GET /api/jobs/{id} returns 200 for valid, 404 for unknown
POST /api/jobs/apply creates job_apply lead with job_id; unknown job_id → 404
Admin CRUD: POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/admin/jobs all work with bearer token
GET /api/admin/jobs lists 5 (incl. unpublished new one) for admin
Public /jobs loads via Layout with Header; 4 cards render with type badges
apply-{job_id} button opens apply-modal with apply-name/email/phone/resume/cover fields
apply-submit submits successfully; toast 'Application submitted!' shown; modal closes
New job_apply lead appears in admin Leads table (Test Applicant / applicant@test.com)
chatbot-toggle (bottom-right) opens chatbot-panel; typing 'mock' + chatbot-send returns reply containing ₹499 and ₹999
floating-whatsapp positioned at x≈24 (bottom-left); chatbot-toggle at x≈1285 (bottom-right) — no overlap

failed.issue: Admin Dashboard Jobs tab content panel is completely missing — clicking tab-jobs activates the tab visually but the body is empty. No new-job-btn, no job rows, no edit/delete UI is rendered. JobModal cannot be opened from the UI, so admin cannot create/update/delete jobs via the dashboard (only via direct API).
failed.evidence: DOM under tab-jobs has 0 elements matching [data-testid^='jm-'], [data-testid='new-job-btn'], or [data-testid^='job-row']. Code review of /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.jsx shows only `{tab === 'overview' && ...}`, `{tab === 'leads' && ...}`, and `{tab === 'blogs' && ...}` blocks (lines 101–214). No `{tab === 'jobs' && ...}` block exists. JobModal is defined at line 300 and `loadJobs`/`jobs` state exist, but the panel JSX was not added.

failed.issue: Leads tab does not render Type badge text for job_apply leads (LEAD_TYPE_LABELS['job_apply'] missing) and there is no 'job_apply' filter chip in the leads filter row.
failed.evidence: Screenshot shows Test Applicant / applicant@test.com row in Leads table with an empty Type column. Leads filter row only contains: all, contact, hiring, college, mock_booking, student_enroll — no job_apply option. Body text confirms 'Job Application' label is absent.

action_items: Add the missing `{tab === 'jobs' && (...) }` JSX panel in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.jsx (between the blogs block and the closing div around line 214). Include: count summary, `new-job-btn` (calls setShowJob({})), list/grid of jobs with title/company/type/published, and Edit (setShowJob(j)) / Delete (DELETE /api/admin/jobs/{id}) actions.
Add `job_apply: 'Job Application'` (and a TYPE_COLORS entry) to LEAD_TYPE_LABELS so the Leads tab badge renders correctly.
Add a 'job_apply' filter button to the leads filter chip row.
Minor: backend POST /api/admin/jobs ignores `is_published` in payload (uses `published` field name); confirm intended schema name and align.
